NAME_MIN: Name must be at least 3 characters
PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters
PASSWORD_LOWERCASE: Password must contain a lowercase letter
PASSWORD_UPPERCASE: Password must contain an uppercase letter
PASSWORD_SPECIAL: Password must contain a special character
PASSWORD_CONFIRM_MATCH: Password and confirm password do not match
TERMS_REQUIRED: Please accept the terms and conditions
BUSINESS_NAME_MIN: Business name must be at least 3 characters
DESCRIPTION_MIN: Description must be at least 10 characters
PHONE_INVALID: Phone number must be between 10 and 15 digits
CURRENT_PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Current password is required to change password
NEW_PASSWORD_LIMITS: New password must be 10–64 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and special character
CONFIRM_PASSWORD_MATCH: Confirm password does not match the new password
PRICE_AFTER_MUST_BE_LESS: Price after offer must be less than or equal to price before offer
